creator: makc@issp.ac.ru
text:
On Monday 17 March 2008, you wrote:
> Hi, The port does not build. Can you take a look at it?
>
> http://head.miwibox.org/tb/index.php?action=describe_port&id=2417
> http://amd64.miwibox.org/tb/index.php?action=describe_port&id=2404
>
> Thanks Martin

Hi Martin,

Attached is a diff vs. port version. I've added -shared-libgcc to LDFLAGS, 
this fixes build on 6.x (tested) and on 5.x (I hope). By the way, your 
tinderbox uses gcc42 for 5.x and 6.x builds, is it intentional?

May I ask you to take my ports/119904 also?

Cheers,
Max
